content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently operates from core AoA moves at appropriate moments without naming frameworks as decoration. Turn 4 deploys 'where does that land in your body' — a signature feel-over-figure move — right when the client has named an emotional content. Turn 6 catches the move-to-figuring (a hallmark AoA read: noticing the escape from sensation into intellectualization) and redirects to the felt sense. Turn 8 ('what if it doesn't have to be productive?') directly undermines the productivity/figuring frame in classic AoA fashion. Turn 10 ('let it be as big as it actually is') is the calibrate-the-threshold / welcome-what-is move at exactly the right moment. Turn 12 catches the self-as-broken identity language — a clean 'what are you defending' / identity-noticing intervention without fighting it. The coach refuses partner-picking advice, refuses to collude with the disdain for the ex, and does not deploy attachment-style diagnosis even when the client offers it as bait in turn 13. No anti-AoA frames (no CBT reframing, no IFS parts, no pop-psych). Moves are appropriate to the live moment rather than boilerplate.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the configuration back without colluding with victim frame; opens with a stance-neutral question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature drop-into-body move at appropriate moment — client just named a painful feeling-thought."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the move from sensation to intellectualization — classic AoA read of feel-over-figure escape."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Undermines the productivity frame that's defending against feeling — appropriate methodology deployment."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Welcoming-what-is / calibrate-the-threshold move at the precise moment client touches the weight."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the 'broken' identity language without fighting it — gentle noticing rather than reframing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stay-with move when something true has just landed; trusts the unfolding rather than interpreting."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion (approached but not yet at the abyss/receiving question)"],
  "notes": "Coach has not yet asked the 'what would happen in your body if a partner adored you openly' question, but the conversation is mid-arc and the methodology choices so far are all appropriately timed. No inappropriate-when deployments observed."
}
